menu.header: What would you like to do?
menu.lang.en.sub: Voice alerts and GPS descriptions will be in English.
menu.lang.es.sub: Las alertas de voz y GPS ahora son en español.
tts.startup: Clean Shot online. Drive safe out there.
hazard.too_far: Too far from reported location to confirm ({dist:.1f} mi away)
hazard.no_position: Cannot confirm — no GPS position available
tts.black_ice: Smokey's reporting black ice ahead good buddy — back it down
tts.bridge_freeze: Watch those bridge decks driver — they freeze before the road does
tts.fog: We got a ground-hugger ahead — slow your roll and keep it on the white line
tts.flood: Water on the road ahead breaker — don't drown that rig
tts.diesel_gel: Breaker breaker — temps are dropping, your diesel might be gelling up
tts.high_wind: Got some hammer lane wind at your door — watch that trailer
tts.mudslide: Got some heavy rain that might be moving dirt around good buddy — watch for debris on the road
tts.heavy_snow: Snow's coming down hard out there — might be time to find a chicken coop
tts.ice_storm: It's a skating rink out there good buddy — park it if you can
tts.thunderstorm: Got some steel rain moving in — eye out for lightning and hydroplaning
tts.tornado_watch: Twister weather on deck — keep your ears on and find low ground
tts.hurricane: Big blow coming through — get off the road and tie her down
tts.heat_advisory: Scorcher out there — check your tires and drink some water
tts.hazard_reported: Got a community report ahead — eyes up and slow your roll
tts.hos_warning: You're burning daylight on your clock good buddy — start looking for a spot
tts.parking_ahead: Got a truck stop in your runway — might be worth a look
tts.quiet_hours: Quiet hours active — alerts paused until {end}
